title: At Indira Jaising's book launch, Justice BV Nagarathna calls for sisterhood in legal profession
description: For centuries, the legal profession remained the exclusive domain of male lawyers who benefitted from social networks and professional solidarity, Supreme Court Justice BV Nagarathna said on Thursday.Women too need to build such communities of solidarity to ensure that the progress made thus far in terms of women's presence in law, does not taper off, she opined."The legal profession can be intensely competitive but the most enduring progress has come when women refused isolation and chose solid
